title: 高松宮記念の後に・あなたの背は

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
King is victorious in the Takamatsunomiya Kinen.
Despite facing heavy criticism for destroying the
dreams of the next generation, she boldly asserts
that this is the path she's chosen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Through her actions and words, King shows me
how to take pride in being myself!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I must stop being afraid of hurting others and
behave in a way that's true to myself! I decide to
participate in the talk show at the Fan Fest as a
way to show my conviction.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's scary, of course, but I have someone by my
side who reassures me that I'm not alone!
